diagnosis: Taylor legacy promoted pdf_url Batch 81 produced approval-quality evidence for 42/50 promoted candidates. Approved rows reached /doi/pdf with HTTP 200 and screenshots. 8 rows lacked approval-quality evidence (missing direct PDF status or weak render).
recommendation: Continue with final Taylor legacy promoted pdf_url cleanup batch skip 110 limit 8 over the promoted candidate artifact; then route the 6 deferred off-pattern/chapter rows to manual DOI/publisher-specific review. Keep all derived labels separate from current-Goldie KPI.
